description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a solid wooden frame that encases the seat and back. The seat is upholstered in a dark, likely charcoal or black fabric, with a tufted pattern visible on the seating surface. Four large, loose back cushions and two smaller side cushions provide ample comfort and are arranged symmetrically along the backrest. The armrests are straight, flat, and integrated into the wooden frame, extending at the same height as the backrest. The sofa stands on four black, metal sled-style legs that elevate it above the ground, giving it a contemporary and airy appearance. The overall look is sleek and urban, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular sofa with a wooden frame, dark tufted upholstery, loose cushions, and black sled-style legs. Its minimalist design and solid construction make it suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, all six cushions, and the straight wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden frame, the depth of the seat, and the arrangement of cushions along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's depth and cushion arrangement from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose cushions: four large back cushions and two smaller side cushions, all uniform in size and symmetrically arranged; seat is a single, tufted bench cushion.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat wooden armrests integrated into the frame, at the same height as the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four black metal sled-style legs, positioned at the corners, exposed and slightly inset from the frame, providing a modern and sturdy base.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest formed by the wooden frame, topped with loose, large cushions for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a visible tufted pattern on the seat; cushions and backrest appear smooth and unpatterned.
